faults.name: Gain resistor open
faults.why: The first-stage gain depends on the shared gain resistor; an open part collapses or exaggerates gain.
faults.verification_test: Power off and measure the gain resistor directly.
faults.fix_recipe: Install the correct gain resistor between the first-stage inverting nodes.

faults.name: Input common-mode out of range
faults.why: Instrumentation amplifiers reject common-mode only inside their valid input range.
faults.verification_test: Measure both inputs and compute their average relative to supply rails.
faults.fix_recipe: Shift the input common-mode or supply rails into the valid range.

faults.name: Difference amplifier resistor mismatch
faults.why: The final difference stage needs matched resistor ratios for CMRR and gain accuracy.
faults.verification_test: Power off and compare the four difference-amplifier resistors.
faults.fix_recipe: Use matched resistor pairs or a resistor network.
